I needed help to fix a leaking roof and Dave was great! You can tell he is an expert in roofing. Dave took the time to explain the cause of the leak and present different options to fix it. You can tell customer experience and satisfaction is top priority.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nancy Blatchford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9YcDfK0UCM7FKRUqHanNCO9_hNvYrN0kThDj_GGrxdHy_3qh0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tyler from Best West Roofing is a pleasure to deal with.  He originally came out in January 2020 to address a leak we had coming through our kitchen ceiling.  At first, I was a bit disappointed that Brock didn't come out when we called (because most of the reviews referred to him), but Tyler was extremely professional and took great care with his work.  We are really glad he was assigned to us as he is a pleasure to deal with.

He fixed the leak we had, and then advised us what work needed to be done to prevent future issues from arising.  We never felt pressured or like he was trying to make us spend unncessarily but that he sincerely wanted to help us maintain and extend the life of our roof as much as possible before having to replace it or encounter major issues.

We took our time thinking about it and had the suggested work done in September 2020 to prepare for the rainy season.  We should have done it right away as there was a small wait once the busy roofing season hit over the summer, but Tyler kept us updated as to where we were in the queue and we love the extra care and attention he provided.  He even removed some chicken bones that crows had carried onto our roof and caulked a small area of our gutter that was leaking.  Those were small things, but I appreciate how he treated the area like it was his own and didn't just ignore the garbage on the roof or just brush it off the side nor wait until we had a more serious issue with the leaking gutter.

It's clear he cares about his work and reputation.  I will definately continue to call Tyler at Best West Roofing for any issues that come up with our roof in the future as well as recommend them to family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"George Merry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi4XpK3S9Ix7EflHNTM2GuwsT7bsWws7KhPmUwjBLxO68_wA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From initial contact to completion our re-roofing project was superbly handled. The  detailed quote, excellent communications and hard work ethic were well demonstrated by Tyler Schultz and the Best West Team on our job.

Not only is this self-managed Strata Council extremely pleased with the results but we were surprised, actually, by the number of home owners and tenants alike who took the time to comment, not only on how well the project went and how pleased they were with the end results, but also how well they were treated by the Best West Roofing Crew in any encounter onsite with real answers to any questions professionally handled.

We have various roofing projects to be done over the next few years and are definitely looking forward to working with Best West Roofing who we highly recommend.

Sincerely,

George Merry
Strata Chairperson","Images":null,"When":""}]

We started working with him many years back when he was part of another company. Since then, we have kept in touch and I've followed his work with interest. Residential projects Walter has worked on for me included a custom greenhouse on a concrete pad, a custom glass deck awning, and a small second floor room addition (a mock wine cellar). He also worked on a large commercial project that involved converting a 1970s era store front into a unique cafe.

What I respect most about Walter is that he treats the job site the way he would treat his own home. He and his team are clean, conscientious, and pleasant to have around. In the residential projects, we had the team in our house every day for a few weeks, and we were actually sad to see them go when it was done!

In the commercial project, we were impressed with his work ethic and quality.
